description: Example bank-personnel roster. Provided by the bank at Shadow deployment time. Names in this roster are skipped by proxy-detector.js so the scanner doesn't flag the bank's own compliance officer's name as protected-class-adjacent (red-team B3 defense). Actual roster file lives in bank's private config; this example ships as documentation only.

personnel.reason_allowlisted: internal reviewer, name appears in memory rationales
example — first name would trigger surname_ssa_ethnic_correlation without allowlist
example — surname would trigger without allowlist

deploy_note: Save your real roster as SHADOW_BANK_PERSONNEL_ROSTER_PATH env var pointing to a private JSON file with same shape. Do NOT commit real personnel names to the Shadow repo.
